project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Project.ConsoleApp1.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizi_metodi.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizio.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizio_Linq.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizio_array.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizio_csv2.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Esercizio_liste.executor": "Debug", ".NET Project.Esercizio_txt.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Incap_ered_polim.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Link.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Liste_etc.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Liste_prv.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Metodi.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Tombola.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.array.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.array_bidim.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.crudds.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.mySQL_2.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.override.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.ptova 1.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
